title: BAND-MAID YouTube Quiz
description: Test your knowledge of BAND-MAID on YouTube.

questions.question: Which of these BAND-MAID videos has the most total views on YouTube?
questions.explanation:
BAND-MAID / Ready to Rock (Official Live Video ver. 3 #shorts )  TVアニメ「ロックは淑女の嗜みでして」オープニングテーマソング — Views: 124,977 | Yesterday: 12

BAND-MAID / What is justice? (Official Live Video 2 #shorts )  TVアニメ「桃源暗鬼」エンディング主題歌 — Views: 70,791 | Yesterday: 15
